routing_rules.action: Verify latest authority pointer copies and new-chat validator before boot-critical execution.
Record the wrong CLI shape as a method reliability lesson; preserve amended pass as authoritative.
Treat CE/SEE synthesis packets as evidence packets, not failures, unless an explicit deny/error field exists.
Hold execution if active and attach source artifact for review.

status_semantics.MONITOR: track and prevent recurrence without blocking current stage
status_semantics.RESOLVED_REFERENCE: historical evidence resolved by later passing artifact
status_semantics.SUPPRESSED_BY_LATER_PASS: not active because a newer pass supersedes it
